title: Faithhyy Private PVP Pack
description: A Private PVP Pack made by Faithhyy.
body:
Ever looked for a PVP texture pack and didn't know which one to choose? Look no further with my Private PVP Pack. This pack is made for PVPers and by a PVPer. 

**What does this pack have to offer?**
- Smaller Utils
- Short Swords
- Darker Tool Handles and Tools
- Darker Totem
- Darker Trident
- Darker End Crystal
- Darker Mace
- Darker Wind Charge
- Darker Fireworks
- Dark Transparent GUI
- Custom Hotbar
- Black Hearts
- Darker Golden Apples/GOD Apples
- Custom Sky
- _And More..._

**Dependencies**

For the custom sky you need either [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) or [Skyboxify](https://modrinth.com/mod/skyboxify)
